scenarios.title: Page loads with trim panel visible
scenarios.expectedResult: Trim panel is visible and controls are rendered

scenarios.title: Upload video file
scenarios.expectedResult: Video file is uploaded and preview is shown

scenarios.title: Set trim start time
scenarios.expectedResult: Start time is set to 5.5 seconds

scenarios.title: Set trim end time
scenarios.expectedResult: End time is set to 15.8 seconds

scenarios.title: Process trim with valid range
scenarios.expectedResult: Video is trimmed and download is available

scenarios.title: Start time equals zero
scenarios.expectedResult: Accepts zero as valid start time

scenarios.title: End time before start time
scenarios.expectedResult: Shows error when end time < start time (if start > 2)

scenarios.title: Negative start time
scenarios.expectedResult: Rejects or resets negative value due to min=0 constraint

scenarios.title: Speed control panel loads successfully

scenarios.expectedResult: Video file is accepted and loaded for processing

scenarios.title: Adjust speed using range slider to custom value

scenarios.title: Apply 0.5x Slow Mo preset
scenarios.expectedResult: Speed is set to 0.5x slow motion

scenarios.title: Apply 0.75x Slower preset
scenarios.expectedResult: Speed is set to 0.75x

scenarios.title: Apply 1.5x Fast preset
scenarios.expectedResult: Speed is set to 1.5x fast

scenarios.title: Apply 2x Double preset
scenarios.expectedResult: Speed is set to 2x double speed

scenarios.title: Apply 3x Triple preset
scenarios.expectedResult: Speed is set to 3x triple speed

scenarios.title: Process video with selected speed
scenarios.expectedResult: Video processing starts and completes successfully

scenarios.expectedResult: Speed is set to minimum 0.25x

scenarios.title: Set speed to maximum boundary value
scenarios.expectedResult: Speed is set to maximum 4.0x

scenarios.expectedResult: Error message displayed requesting video upload

scenarios.expectedResult: Error message displayed indicating invalid file format
